creator: eischen@vigrid.com
text:
gdb distributions are found in the gdb subdir of MASTER_SITE_GNU
sites.  Use MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR to indicate this.

Dan Eischen
eischen@vigrid.com

--- Makefile.orig	Thu Apr  8 02:44:00 1999
+++ Makefile	Thu Apr  8 02:43:19 1999
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://cs.nyu.edu/pub/gnat/ \
 		${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	gdb
 DISTFILES=	gnat-3.11p-src.tar.gz gdb-4.17.tar.gz
 
 MAINTAINER=	eischen@vigrid.com
